label: Desert
comfortReason: Extreme heat, zero shade, no water. Survival without shelter is a gamble.
scoutGuidance: Survival check. Poor: 2-11 | Average: 12-16 | Good: 17+. Ranger has advantage. No nature proficiency has disadvantage.

nat1: A sheltered dune with good shade from a rock face.
Rock overhang with shade. Looks like a solid spot.
A small oasis with clear water and palm cover.
poor: Open sand. No shade, no cover.
A shallow depression. Better than nothing.
average: A dried riverbed with steep banks.
Wind-carved alcove in a cliff face.
good: A deep canyon slot, hidden from the wind.
An abandoned waystation, walls still standing.
A cave mouth facing away from the wind.
nat20: A hidden spring in a sheltered grotto.
An intact underground cistern, cool and defensible.
A palm grove oasis, surrounded by natural barriers.

mealRules.note: Arid heat causes rapid dehydration. Double water requirement.
